summary: Meera lives with Type 2 Diabetes (diagnosed 2021) and takes Metformin 500mg twice daily. Her most recent HbA1c is 7.8%, a little above the ~7% goal often used in diabetes care, and her recent cholesterol and thyroid checks are broadly within their usual ranges. She also has a penicillin allergy (rash). These are plain-language explanations of her own records — not a diagnosis — and her doctor reads them alongside her full picture.
